description_long: This object is a fresh cucumber with a dark green, bumpy skin and a slightly elongated, cylindrical shape. The surface is covered with small, raised nodules and subtle speckles, giving it a textured appearance. One end features a dried, yellowish blossom remnant, while the opposite end is rounded and slightly tapered. The cucumber's skin appears matte with a natural, semi-soft firmness typical of fresh produce. Its coloration is predominantly a deep green, with some lighter green highlights and a pale yellow at the blossom end. The overall look suggests it is a garden cucumber, likely harvested recently.
description: A dark green, bumpy cucumber with a dried blossom at one end and a textured, matte surface. The skin is speckled and the shape is slightly elongated and cylindrical.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cucumber, highlighting its bumpy, dark green skin and the dried blossom at the left end.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the rounded, slightly tapered end of the cucumber with the blossom not visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cucumber's length and the dried blossom now on the right, with similar bumpy texture.
description_view_3: End-on view focusing on the dried, yellowish blossom remnant, with the cucumber's cylindrical body receding away.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: small raised nodules, subtle speckles, dried blossom remnant
